stemHtml: At 15:15, ATC changed your call sign from GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF to SKYFALL ZULU GOLF. When do you revert?

options.a: Automatically on the next frequency change, or when ATC instructs.
options.b: Automatically at the next reporting point, or when ATC instructs.
options.c: When instructed by ATC, or automatically at 15:45.
options.d: When ATC instructs "REVERT TO FLIGHT PLAN CALL SIGN GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF".
